curation_notes: Single-file patch adding libxml_disable_entity_loader(true) and libxml_use_internal_errors(true) before simplexml_load_string() in the decode method of Encoder/XmlEncoder.php. Pre-assigned class xxe confirmed — CWE-611 matches the fix which disables external entity processing. No sibling files contain XML parsing; JsonEncoder.php is the only other encoder and does not use XML APIs.
